content.content:
commit ffb532ff061189fefa655cd2a243d1da78034b85
Author: Patrick Flynn <big.pat@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon May 18 21:24:02 2026 -0400

    prototype: re-skin UI to match balance design language
    
    Port the balance palette (sage / cream / sand / forest / mint) and
    shape language (rounded-[2rem] cards, soft shadows, uppercase
    tracking-wide labels, Inter-only, floating pill nav) across all
    visible flux surfaces. Light mode is balance verbatim; dark mode
    preserves the warm/earthy spirit on a deep forest base.
    
    Purely visual — no logic, state, or test changes.

 index.html                                    |  3 +-
 src/App.tsx                                   | 51 +++++++-------
 src/index.css                                 | 72 ++++++++++++-------
 src/tabs/Checkin.tsx                          | 20 +++++-
 src/tabs/Meditate.tsx                         | 20 +++++-
 src/tabs/Settings.tsx                         | 41 ++++++-----
 src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx | 91 +++++++++++++-----------
 src/tabs/Workouts/components/Timer.tsx        | 19 +++--
 src/tabs/Workouts/components/VideoModal.tsx   |  6 +-
 src/tabs/Workouts/index.tsx                   | 99 +++++++++++++++------------
 tailwind.config.js                            |  8 ++-
 11 files changed, 267 insertions(+), 163 deletions(-)
===
commit e79e56ca5ac08e87c7a4176de686b6481d3671f7
Author: Patrick Flynn <big.pat@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon May 18 21:13:30 2026 -0400

    settings: move Reset to Data card; dismissible import messages
    
    - Move handleReset from Workouts toolbar into Settings Data card under
      a "Danger zone" divider. Workouts bottom toolbar now contains only
      prev-day + next-day.
    - Add inline dismiss (×) buttons to both import-message displays
      (program-import on Workouts, backup-import on Settings).
    - Rename duplicate data-testid="import-message" to flow-specific IDs:
      program-import-message and backup-import-message (plus -dismiss
      siblings). Update all tests accordingly.
    - Add Playwright test covering the dismiss flow.
    
    Closes #74
    Closes #75

 src/tabs/Settings.tsx       | 40 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-----
 src/tabs/Workouts/index.tsx | 37 ++++++++++++++-----------------------
 tests/import-export.spec.ts |  4 ++--
 tests/import.spec.ts        | 26 +++++++++++++++++++++-----
 tests/workouts.spec.ts      |  2 +-
 5 files changed, 73 insertions(+), 36 deletions(-)
===
commit 43e09629a40234d6c1abdf1875f075053df43b94
Author: Patrick Flynn <big.pat@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon May 18 21:18:02 2026 -0400

    settings: handle errors in reset flow
    
    Wrap clearAll() in try/catch so failures surface as a reset-failed
    message instead of misleading the user with 'Reset complete.'

 src/tabs/Settings.tsx | 10 ++++++++--
 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

content.content:
package.json
tsconfig.json

{
  "name": "flux",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Umbrella app: Workouts, Meditate, Check-in",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "typecheck": "tsc -b --noEmit",
    "test": "playwright test",
    "validate-catalog": "tsx scripts/validate-catalog.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@capacitor/android": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/app": "^6.0.2",
    "@capacitor/core": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/haptics": "^6.0.2",
    "preact": "^10.25.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@capacitor/cli": "^6.2.0",
    "@playwright/test": "1.57.0",
    "@preact/preset-vite": "^2.10.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "postcss": "^8.4.49",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.17",
    "tsx": "^4.22.1",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

content.text:
Pushed. Summary:

- Rebased `agent/20260518-2117-78d7d568` onto `origin/main`, picking up `e79e56c` (Reset moved to Settings, dismissible import messages) and `43e0962` (reset error handling).
- Resolved both conflicts by combining main's dismiss flow + new test IDs (`backup-import-message`, `program-import-message`) with the re-skin's visual language (`rounded-2xl`, `shadow-flux-soft`, `tracking-[0.15em]`). Dropped the now-orphaned Reset button from the Workouts toolbar; re-skinned the Danger zone in Settings to match.
- Typecheck, vite build, and all 15 Playwright tests pass.
- Force-pushed with `--force-with-lease`; PR #78 will update automatically.

result:
Pushed. Summary:

- Rebased `agent/20260518-2117-78d7d568` onto `origin/main`, picking up `e79e56c` (Reset moved to Settings, dismissible import messages) and `43e0962` (reset error handling).
- Resolved both conflicts by combining main's dismiss flow + new test IDs (`backup-import-message`, `program-import-message`) with the re-skin's visual language (`rounded-2xl`, `shadow-flux-soft`, `tracking-[0.15em]`). Dropped the now-orphaned Reset button from the Workouts toolbar; re-skinned the Danger zone in Settings to match.
- Typecheck, vite build, and all 15 Playwright tests pass.
- Force-pushed with `--force-with-lease`; PR #78 will update automatically.
